# Figure Description

## Figure Type

This is a **data inventory table** (реестр/опись графических материалов) — specifically a registry or catalogue page listing graphical/cartographic materials produced as part of the geological survey. It is page III of what appears to be a multi-page index of figures, maps, and cross-sections compiled for Report 36572. The table has 7 columns tracking item numbers, titles, scales, copy counts, security classification, and material type.

---

## Coverage and Subject

The table catalogues graphical materials numbered **45 through 57**, covering a wide range of geophysical and geological outputs related to map sheets **M-42 and N-42** (northern Kazakhstan). Specific content includes:

- **Magnetic anomaly maps** covering numerous sub-sheets: М-42-137-В,Г; 138; 126-В,Г; 139; 140; 128-Г; 129-В,Г,Г; 141; М-42-3-В,Г; 4,5,6; 7-А,Б; 9,15,16,17,18,26,27,28,29,38,39,40,41,51,52,53,54,64-А,Б; 65,66
- **Isodepth maps** (схемы изоглубин) for seismic reflecting horizons **T₁** and **T₄**
- **Isopach map** (схема изопахит) of the **Владимировская свита** (Vladimirskaya Formation)
- **Geological cross-sections** comparing Carboniferous and Permian deposits along the western part of the **Тенизская впадина** (Teniz Depression)
- **Borehole geological sections** (геологические разрезы по скважинам) for wells: **№114, №118, №122, №124, №130, №131, №132, №133**

---

## Key Content

The table records the following key attributes for each figure:

| Item | Description | Scale | Copies | Classification | Material |

| 49 | Correlation of geological sections, Carboniferous & Permian, western Teniz Depression | 1:2000 | 10 | не секретно | карт.бумага |
| 50 | Geological section, well №114 | 1:200 | 1 | не секретно | светочувствительная |
| 51–57 | Geological sections, wells №118, 122, 124, 130, 131, 132, 133 | same as above | same | same | same |

Notable observations:
- **Items 50–57** (borehole logs) are printed on **светочувствительная** (photosensitive/blueprint-type) paper, distinguishing them from the map-paper items
- Item 49 has **10 copies** — notably more than all others (1 copy each), suggesting it was widely distributed or used as a key reference section
- All items are classified as **не секретно** (not secret/unclassified)
- The magnetic anomaly map (item 45) covers an exceptionally large number of sub-sheets, indicating regional coverage
